title: Madhya Pradesh High Court declares Bhojshala-Kamal Maula mosque complex as temple
description: In a judgment which could have significant bearing on disputed religious sites, the Madhya Pradesh High Court on Friday declared that the Bhojshala-Kamal Maula Mosque complex in Dhar district is a temple [Hindu Front for Justice v Union of India Ministry of Culture].A Bench of Justices Vijay Kumar Shukla and Alok Awasthi quashed the order passed by Archeological Survey of India (ASI) in 2003 by which Muslims had been granted permission to hold prayers at the site."2003 ASI order to the extent re
